meta.source_file: Mia OSA RACE_Dutoit Always-On_ Apple Pie Day.pdf

objectives: Deepen emotional connection with Dutoit by positioning the brand as part of family traditions and shared kitchen moments.
Increase sales of Dutoit apple bags in Pick n Pay during campaign window.
Drive UGC and participation through the magnet mechanic and social posting requirement.

phases.strategy: Build emotional territory and mass awareness of the 'advice' platform before the competition push. 23 Feb - mid April. Meta Ad as primary engine. Creative themes: 'The best advice with every slice', nostalgic kitchen moments, handwritten notes visual system. Formats: Reels (hero), Story ads, Static postcards. Targeting: Women 25-54, Parents, Baking interests, Pick n Pay shoppers, Lookalikes from Dutoit engagers. Google Ads: Light but strategic — apple pie recipe searches, baking searches, branded defence. Organic Social content engine: Call for advice, recipe content, community spotlights. Email: Existing database awareness, Apple Pie Day build-up.

channel_actions.objective: Build emotional salience and broad awareness of the 'Advice Behind the Slice' platform at efficient scale.
channel_actions.strategy: Use high-reach, emotionally resonant creative to establish Dutoit as part of family traditions and kitchen moments, prioritising video-first formats to maximise efficient reach.

assets.key_message: The best advice with every slice.
Some advice stays with you forever.

channel_actions.objective: Prime the community emotionally and introduce the advice platform.
channel_actions.strategy: Use high-reach, emotionally resonant creative to establish Dutoit as part of family traditions and kitchen moments, prioritising video-first formats to maximise efficient reach.

assets.key_message: The best advice with every slice.
Some advice stays with you forever.

channel_actions.objective: Warm the existing database and build early campaign awareness.
channel_actions.strategy: Leverage owned audience to introduce the campaign narrative and prime future participation.

assets.key_message: Introduce Advice Behind the Slice. + Kitchen Aid Comp.

phases.strategy: Primary CTA: 'Share the advice that stayed with you.' Meta optimised for engagement (video views, traffic to landing page). Creative: question-led posts, UGC prompts, comment bait formats. Landing page must capture: advice submission, email (for Engage phase), consent for reuse. Organic weekly rhythm: community reposts, handwritten advice cards, 'Advice of the week'. Email sends: advice submission push, reminder to submit, community spotlight.

channel_actions.objective: Drive advice submissions and meaningful engagement.
channel_actions.strategy: Shift from broad emotional reach to participation-focused creative using prompts, questions, and social proof.

assets.key_message: What's the best advice you've ever received?

channel_actions.objective: Drive advice submissions and meaningful engagement.
channel_actions.strategy: Shift from broad emotional reach to participation-focused creative using prompts, questions, and social proof.

assets.key_message: What's the best advice you've ever received?

channel_actions.objective: Convert warm audiences into advice contributors.
channel_actions.strategy: Use targeted sends to push submissions and remind non-responders.

phases.objective: Turn emotional equity into: Apple bag purchases, Magnet collection and Competition entries.
phases.strategy: 28 April - 15 May (peak) with Apple Pie Day on 13 May as the spike. Meta Ads conversion push: store traffic, engagement (UGC proof), reminder ads. Creative phases: Late April 'Collect the slices', Early May 'Complete your pie', Apple Pie Day week URGENCY creatives with countdown. Google Ads switch focus to: brand search, 'Apple specials', 'Pick n Pay apples'. Email: 'Magnets now in-store', 'Complete your pie', Apple Pie Day countdown.

channel_actions.objective: Drive apple bag purchases, magnet collection, and competition entries.
channel_actions.strategy: Shift to urgency-led retail messaging supported by strong social proof of completed pies.

channel_actions.objective: Drive social proof and retail urgency.

assets.asset_name: Prize Showcase Post Series: Ceramic Kitchen Set
Countdown Post Series: Apple Pie Day

channel_actions.objective: Capture high-intent shoppers ready to purchase.
channel_actions.strategy: Pivot search toward purchase-driven queries and brand reinforcement.

channel_actions.objective: Push warm audience to purchase and complete collections.
channel_actions.strategy: Urgency-driven retail emails during peak window.

details.subject_line: Apple Pie Day is almost here

phases.objective: Turn participants into long-term brand advocates.
phases.strategy: Apple Pie Day (13 May), Winner announcement (15 May), Post-campaign storytelling. Organic Social: winner stories, community thank-you, best advice compilation, recipe content continues. Email from Phase 1 database: Apple Pie Day celebration mail, community highlights, future recipe content.

channel_actions.strategy: Celebrate the community and extend recipe-led value.

assets.asset_name: Winner Carousel Post Series: Winner Reveal

channel_actions.objective: Deepen loyalty and maintain long-term engagement.
channel_actions.strategy: Close the loop with community celebration and ongoing value.
